title: F3 raw API behavior for BBL 9999999999 -> []
capture_method: live curl GET by M1-T002 producer, tokenless, single KB-scale request (polite shared-pool use)
notes: Documents the raw endpoint behavior only. 9999999999 violates the accepted canonical BBL pattern ^[1-5][0-9]{9}$ (common.schema.json), so the connector rejects it client-side as validation_error BEFORE any network call; the [] no-match path is proven by F03b and F02b.
